CustomField.description: Prorate % for incomplete utilization periods for the Total amount calculation. 100% for a full month or based on actual number of days in the utilization period divided by 30 or actual number of days in month (based on parameter on the Lease page)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Prorate % for incomplete utilization periods for the Total amount calculation. 100% for a full month or based on actual number of days in the utilization period divided by 30 or actual number of days in month (based on parameter on the Lease page)
CustomField.label: Prorate
